base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hero_plainclothes_walk — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Hero (descendant of Erdrick) in plainclothes starting outfit — 4 directions (down/left/up/right) × 2-frame walk cycle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hero (descendant of Erdrick) in plainclothes starting outfit — 4 directions (down/left/up/right) × 2-frame walk cycle; used at game start before any armor purchase. Simple tunic, brown hair
